MODULE: cosmos.core.learning.continual
FILE: cosmos/core/learning/continual.py (112 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Continual Learning Engine.

"I don't just learn; I accumulate wisdom without displacing the old stuff!"

This module implements mechanisms to prevent catastrophic forgetting and enable graceful skill acquisition.

Features:
1. Experience Replay: Buffers important past events to re-validate ne

- ExperienceReplayBuffer: Stores critical experiences.

  Methods: def sample(self, batch_size: int) -> list[Experience]
